author: y4rr
content: Plan: Sprint V.2 scope for #932 — extend conformance_vision_models.rs with seeded logit-parity tests for mobilenet_v2 and mobilenet_v3_small. Approach: (1) create fixtures_v_parity.json with reference logits captured via regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py using manual_seed=42, (2) add test fns mobilenet_v2_logit_parity_seeded and mobilenet_v3_small_logit_parity_seeded with F32_MATMUL=1e-3 tolerance, (3) verify source produces correct shapes before and after. BEFORE: tests exist with shape/finite checks but no logit comparison. AFTER: full parity check against pinned torchvision 0.21 reference.
